positive: A minimalist, stylized depiction of a mountain range at sunrise, viewed through a clean, abstract watercolor filter. The mountains are rendered in varying shades of deep indigo, slate gray, and soft periwinkle blue, creating strong, layered silhouettes against a vibrant, gradient sky of pale peach, warm lavender, and gold. Include subtle, scattered celestial elements like stylized stars or abstract cosmic dust trails. The composition should be centered, highly contrasted, and designed with negative space for text overlay. Style: Mid-Century Modern illustration meets Japanese woodblock print. Composition: Symmetrical, strong horizon line. Lighting: Backlit, high contrast, ethereal glow. Color Palette: Cool blues and purples contrasting with warm pastels.
negative: blurry, noise, text, signature, watermark, low quality, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, dirty, graffiti, cartoon, photographic, deep shadows
